text.title: weak-model-preselection Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for weak-model-preselection as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Big model does the filter itself.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Do not skip the weak model stage. Add a Haiku or Mini stage in front.

failure-mode.description: Cheap model returns full content, just regurgitating the input.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force the schema to return refs and IDs only. Validate with sample runs.

failure-mode.description: Cheap model has a different tokenizer or persona than expected.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use the same family if possible. Test Haiku to Sonnet first, only cross families when necessary.

failure-mode.description: No fallback: when the cheap model returns 0 items, the pipeline dies.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Add if filtered.is_empty: pass full set to strong model.

failure-mode.description: Filter is permissive, keeps 80 percent of items.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tune the cheap-model prompt until keep-rate is less than 30 percent. Otherwise there is no savings.
